name: log_manager
description: Central logging system for all tool invocations, LLM decisions, and agent activity. Writes structured JSONL entries to a master log and per-session log files. Supports querying recent log entries and generating session summaries. Logs are automatically rotated when they exceed 50 MB.

session_id.description: Session identifier (e.g., '20260215_120000'). Required for most write actions.

data.description: Payload for the action. Contents depend on action type: log_tool expects {tool, params, result, duration_ms}; log_decision expects {agent, decision, reasoning, context}; log_agent_switch expects {from, to, reason}; log_error expects {source, error, traceback}; log_event expects {event_type, ...}.

type_filter.description: For 'query' action: filter results to this log entry type (e.g., 'tool_invocation', 'llm_decision', 'error').

last_n.description: For 'query' action: number of most recent entries to return. Defaults to 50.
